trending_videos.title: Evil Dead Burn | Date Announce Teaser
trending_videos.description:
Nowhere to hide. 🔥 #EvilDeadBurn only in theaters July 10. Full trailer coming soon.


Evil Dead Burn unleashes the franchise’s most savage and terrifying ride to date, blazing onto big screens with an all-new chapter of carnage and demonic mayhem. After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into Deadites—turning the gathering into a family reunion from hell—she comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

Director:  Sébastien Vaniček
Cast:  Souheila Yacoub, Tandi Wright, Hunter Doohan, Luciane Buchanan, Errol Shand, Maude Davey, George Pullar, Greta Van Den Brink

trending_videos.title: The Five
trending_videos.description: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

trending_videos.title: Blood Hunt | New PvE Mode Trailer | Marvel Rivals
trending_videos.description:
The Vampire King is free. Monsters lurk in the shadows and roam the city. Dracula returns... 🩸

Team up with up to 4 players to save New York City in our latest PvE mode: Blood Hunt. Test your limits with different difficulties and send the Lord of the Night to his undead doom.

📅 Available: April 23 UTC! 

Welcome to the next chapter of Marvel Rivals PvE. 
Will you hunt or be hunted? 🧛

Play free now on:
 
🔹 Steam: https://t.co/IPhy0Of1cG
🔹 PlayStation: https://t.co/FR0aVfTmcn
🔹 Xbox: https://t.co/GaAYz7Nku6

trending_videos.title: Minnesota Wild at Dallas Stars
trending_videos.description: The Stars host the Wild in Game 2 of their Western Conference first-round series. Minnesota holds a 1-0 lead after a five-goal victory in Game 1. The Stars look to improve on a 1-for-4 power-play performance from the series opener.

trending_videos.title: Silo — Season 3 Official Teaser | Apple TV
trending_videos.description:
The truth will surface. Silo returns July 3 on Apple TV https://apple.co/_Silo

“Silo” is the story of the last ten thousand people on earth, their mile-deep home protecting them from the toxic and deadly world outside. However, no one knows when or why the silo was built and those who try to find out face fatal consequences. Ferguson stars as Juliette, an engineer who seeks answers about a loved one’s murder and tumbles onto a mystery that goes far deeper than she could have ever imagined, leading her to discover that if the lies don’t kill you, the truth will.

“Silo” is produced for Apple TV by Apple Studios. The series is executive produced by Yost, Michael Dinner, Nina Jack, Joanna Thapa, Ferguson, Morten Tyldum, Howey, Fred Golan, Rémi Aubuchon and AMC Studios.

Subscribe to Apple TV’s YouTube channel: https://apple.co/AppleTVYouTube

Follow Apple TV:
Instagram: https://instagram.com/AppleTV
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@AppleTV
Facebook: https://facebook.com/AppleTV
Threads: https

trending_videos.description: In-depth reporting on political developments and dynamic discussions with leading newsmakers, with insights into complex issues.

trending_videos.title: SUPER TROOPERS 3 | Official Trailer | Searchlight Pictures
trending_videos.description:
Everyone’s favorite cops are back with the third installment of the cult comedy classic from the Broken Lizard crew: Super Troopers 3. When Farva’s wildly over-the-top Indian engagement to Thorny’s sister spirals into chaos, the Super Troopers must navigate Thorny’s schemes to break up the relationship, while trying to crack a pernicious new drug ring — all to save the day and maybe the wedding itself.

Directed by: Jay Chandrasekhar
Written by: Broken Lizard
Produced by: Rich Perello
Cast: Jay Chandrasekhar, Kevin Heffernan, Steve Lemme, Paul Soter, Erik Stolhanske, Brian Cox, Marisa Coughlan, Nat Faxon, Chace Crawford, Andrew Dismukes, Hannah Simone, Iqbal Theba, Sakina Jaffrey, Jon Rudnitsky, and Lisa Gilroy

Subscribe To Searchlight Pictures:  https://www.youtube.com/@searchlightpictures

Connect with Super Troopers 3 Online
Follow Super Troopers 3 on INSTAGRAM:  https://www.instagram.com/supertroopers/
Follow Super Troopers 3 on FACEBOOK:  https://www.facebook.com/SuperTroopersMov

trending_videos.title: Anaheim Ducks at Edmonton Oilers
trending_videos.description: Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round between the Ducks and the Oilers takes place at Rogers Place. Edmonton holds home-ice advantage as the No. 2 seed in the Pacific Division. The Ducks' Cutter Gauthier leads the team in points and goals.

entertainment.description: A significant portion of the trending content is entertainment-related, including teasers and trailers for upcoming seasons and movies.
videos: Evil Dead Burn | Date Announce Teaser
Blood Hunt | New PvE Mode Trailer | Marvel Rivals
Silo — Season 3 Official Teaser | Apple TV
SUPER TROOPERS 3 | Official Trailer | Searchlight Pictures
entertainment.insight: There is a consistent interest in teasers and trailers, indicating a strong audience demand for upcoming entertainment content.

sports.description: Sports content is also trending, with NHL games being highlighted.
sports.insight: Live sports events and highlights are attracting significant attention, suggesting an opportunity for sports content creators to capitalize on real-time updates and analysis.

news_and_politics.description: News and political content are present, reflecting a steady audience interest.
news_and_politics.insight: News content continues to trend, especially from major networks, indicating a reliable audience for timely and in-depth political analysis.

music.description: Music videos are also part of the trending list, showcasing diverse genres.
music.insight: Music remains a staple in trending content, suggesting that there is a constant demand for new music videos and unique sound.

major_studios_and_networks.description: Prominent channels from major studios and networks like Warner Bros. and FOX News are consistently producing trending content.
major_studios_and_networks.insight: Established channels have a strong influence on trending content due to their vast audience reach and high production value.

niche_and_indie_creators.description: Smaller, niche creators like Topoppgen are also making an impact with unique content.
niche_and_indie_creators.insight: There is an opportunity for niche and indie creators to trend by tapping into unique or underserved audiences.

cross-promotion.description: There is potential for cross-promotion between entertainment and music content, leveraging fan overlap.
cross-promotion.strategy: Collaborate with music artists to create themed music videos for upcoming movies or series.

real-time engagement.description: Capitalize on the real-time nature of sports and news content.
real-time engagement.strategy: Develop live shows or post-game analysis to engage viewers immediately after events.

diversification.description: Creators can diversify content offerings to capture various audience interests.
diversification.strategy: Experiment with different content types, such as reaction videos or behind-the-scenes content, to broaden appeal.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
